targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS jumlah FROM "GCM_AGCM_LOG_ACTV" WHERE "ACTN_DT"  >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND "ACTN_DT"  <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')

-- "SRVC_NM" = service name
-- "ACTN_DT" = date -> format 2005-12-24 06:42:04
-- "ACCT_CCY_CD" = currency
-- "AMT" = amount
-- "IS_ERR" = N (ga error)
-- ERR_MAP_CD & ERR_MAP_NM 
-- "ACTN_TYP_NM" = action_type
-- "REF_NO"

-- "TRX_STS_CD" = CODE statusnya
-- "TRX_STS_NAME" = transaksi status name
-- 0001 = failoncreation
-- 0002 = pendingapproval
-- 0003 = approvalinprogress
-- 0004 = rejected
-- 0005 = pendingrelease
-- 0006 = expired
-- 0007 = pendingexecute
-- 0008 = cancelled
-- 0010 = inprogress
-- 0011 = executedwithpartialsuccess
-- 0011 = inprogressoffline
-- 0012 = executedsuccessfully
-- 0013 = executedsuccesfully
-- 0013 = executewithfailure
-- 0014 = executedwithpartialsuccess
-- 0014 = executewithfailure
-- 0015 = executionfail
-- 0016 = notexecuted
-- 0017 = failonrecurringcreation
-- 0018 = pendingrepair
-- 008 = cancelled
-- 12 = executedsuccesfully
-- 13 = executewithfailure

-- CLASS = ActivityLog, FinancialActivityLog, NonFinancialActivityLog

SELECT
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "IS_ERR" = 'N')) as Sukses,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "IS_ERR" = 'Y')) as Error
FROM "GCM_AGCM_LOG_ACTV" WHERE "ACTN_DT"  >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND "ACTN_DT"  <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')

-- "SRVC_NM" = service name
-- "ACTN_DT" = date -> format 2005-12-24 06:42:04

-- 0004 = rejected
-- 0005 = pendingrelease
-- 0006 = expired
-- 0007 = pendingexecute
-- 0008 = cancelled
-- 0010 = inprogress
-- 0011 = executedwithpartialsuccess
-- 0011 = inprogressoffline
-- 0012 = executedsuccessfully
-- 0013 = executedsuccesfully
-- 0013 = executewithfailure
-- 0014 = executedwithpartialsuccess
-- 0014 = executewithfailure
-- 0015 = executionfail
-- 0016 = notexecuted
-- 0017 = failonrecurringcreation
-- 0018 = pendingrepair
-- 008 = cancelled

-- 13 = executewithfailure

-- CLASS = ActivityLog, FinancialActivityLog, NonFinancialActivityLog

SELECT
  date_trunc('minute', "ACTN_DT" - interval '7 hour') as time,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "IS_ERR" = 'N')/ COUNT(*), 2) as persentase_sukses
FROM "GCM_AGCM_LOG_ACTV" WHERE "ACTN_DT"  >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND "ACTN_DT"  <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') GROUP BY 1

SELECT "ERR_MAP_CD", COUNT("ERR_MAP_CD") AS "Error Map"
FROM "GCM_AGCM_LOG_ACTV"
WHERE "ACTN_DT" >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
  AND "ACTN_DT" <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
  AND "IS_ERR" = 'Y'
GROUP BY "ERR_MAP_CD"
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 10

-- "SRVC_NM" = service name
-- "ACTN_DT" = date -> format 2005-12-24 06:42:04
-- "ACCT_CCY_CD" = currency
-- "AMT" = amount

-- CLASS = ActivityLog, FinancialActivityLog, NonFinancialActivityLog

SELECT "ERR_MAP_CD", "ERR_MAP_NM", "REF_NO", "ACTN_TYP_NM",
  split_part("TRX_STS_NM", '.', array_length(string_to_array("TRX_STS_NM", '.'), 1)) AS status
FROM "GCM_AGCM_LOG_ACTV"
WHERE "ACTN_DT" >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
  AND "ACTN_DT" <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
  AND "IS_ERR" = 'Y'
GROUP BY "ERR_MAP_CD", 2, 3, 4, 5
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 50
